_doc: Copy to data/gigs/scoring.json (gitignored) to retune gig scoring without editing code. Each key deep-merges over the defaults in gigs/core/scoring_rules.py: dict tables merge per-key, scalars (the *_CAP values) replace. Unknown keys are ignored. Delete the keys you don't want to change.
_doc_title_patterns: Lowercased job-title phrases -> weight added when the title contains them. A match here also rescues the role from the negative-title cap.
_doc_title_tech: Smaller title bonuses for stack signals.
_doc_skill_weights: Full-text skill keyword -> weight (capped by SKILL_WEIGHTS_CAP).
_doc_caps: Scalar caps replace the default outright.
_doc_negatives: Lowercased title phrases that penalize / cap a role.
